CustomProperties.Name: OnLiveProductionPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al confirmar inicio de live production con PIN valido

CustomProperties.Name: OnSetupStartPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al iniciar setup - registrar timestamp

CustomProperties.Name: SetupTimestamp
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Timestamp de inicio de setup - vacio si no iniciado

Rules.InvariantScript: If(IsBlank(ProductionStart.SetupTimestamp), "AWAITING SETUP START — No active setup recorded for this job", "SETUP IN PROGRESS — Started at " & ProductionStart.SetupTimestamp)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
If(
    IsBlank(ProductionStart.SetupTimestamp),
    "Complete setup first",
    If(
        IsBlank(varPinCode),
        "Awaiting supervisor scan...",
        "✓ " & varMatchedStaff.name
    )
)
"Scan supervisor RFID card or enter authorisation code"
